exercises.stem: 选出下列动词中属于感官动词的一项:
exercises.analysis: hear（听到）是感官动词,表示感觉.start, keep, show 是行为动词.
watch TV 是固定搭配,表示「看电视」.look 强调动作,see 强调结果,listen 后要加 to.

exercises.stem: Let me ___ you with your homework
exercises.analysis: let 后接动词原形,不加 to.Let me help you. 表示「让我帮助你」.

exercises.stem: say 和 speak 都可以表示「说某种语言」
exercises.analysis: speak 可以表示「说某种语言」（speak English）,say 侧重说的内容（say hello）.

segments: Can you ___ me the answer to this question?
exercises.analysis: tell 表示「告诉」,tell sb. sth. 是固定搭配,表示「告诉某人某事」.

exercises.question: 请简述 see, look, watch 三个词的区别,并各写一个例句
exercises.referenceAnswer: see 强调「看见」的结果,如 I saw a bird in the tree. look 强调「看」的动作,常与 at 搭配,如 Look at the picture. watch 强调「观看」持续的事物,如 I like watching movies
scoringPoints: see 强调结果,look 强调动作,watch 强调持续观看
说明了 look 要与 at 搭配
